reviewText: The electrode pads stick reliably and hold position during movement. The USB charging is convenient. The clinician-range intensity goes high enough to feel genuinely therapeutic rather than just tingly. Good recovery tool.
reviewTitle: Clinician range intensity is the right spec

reviewMetadata: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2025
reviewText: BMI and body water readings are consistent day over day which is all I need from the metrics. The Bluetooth sync to my phone works reliably. The four-user profiles are genuinely independent. My partner and I both track without our data mixing.
reviewTitle: Consistent metrics and reliable app sync
